name: UPDATE: v1.1.04
content: t|Hello there!
t|I want to show to you a brand new way of communication from us: News!
t|News System was started all the way back to January, but was not working correctly.
t|But now it works, and that's why we published it now.
s|
t|This update doesn't only add this.
t|Because this update also adds something not every games really think about:
t|MESSAGE SYSTEM RESCRIPTED
t|I rescripted and improved the Message System.
t|1 - Sometimes, the text that appears as a Server Message appears in situations where text can't be correctly read by colorblind players.
t|This update adds a transparent background of this text, allowing blindfolded (and regular) players to see it properly.
s|
t|2 - Having that kind of background also allows Multi-Message Support with no big issues, like shown in the following screen.
s|
t|Along with this "News update", I also patched some issues in and there.
s|
t|Anyways, that's it for Update v1.1.04. See you later!
